factions.name: Guardians of the Vale
tips: Kill Crushbone orcs for fast early gains.
Lower Guk undead also grant positive faction at higher levels.
Avoid killing gnolls in the zone — they share faction loss.
factions.notes: Primary good faction for Faydwer wood elves and high elves. Required for cultural armor quests in Kelethin.

factions.name: Merchants of Freeport
tips: Killing gnolls in Commonlands raises faction quickly and can be done solo.
The Freeport Militia quests offer steady mid-level faction gains.
Be careful about completing quests that lower guard faction.
factions.notes: Neutral trade faction. Most races start at indifferent or amiable. KOS only to Iksar and certain dark races.

factions.name: Bloodsabers
tips: Farm Befallen undead — most grant positive Bloodsaber faction.
The Qeynos Catacombs quests are repeatable and efficient.
Watch Qeynos guard faction — grinding Bloodsabers also tanks it.
factions.notes: Underground evil faction tied to Qeynos underbelly. Required for Necromancer and Shadow Knight cultural quests from Qeynos.

factions.name: Truespirit
tips: Kill frogloks in Swamp of No Hope for efficient early gains.
Warsliks Wood goblin camps are a mid-level alternative.
Several quests in Field of Bone chain into Truespirit turnins.
factions.notes: Iksar-primary faction from the Kunark expansion. Non-Iksar players typically need illusions or charm to interact with faction-gated vendors.
